title: campanula pyramidalis
intro: Campanula pyramidalis, also known as the pyramid bellflower, is a perennial plant species in the family Campanulaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Campanula pyramidalis include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Campanula pyramidalis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made from the plant's leaves and flowers.
